BTC.reasoning: Flat decision is coherent given strong bearish trend (SMA distance, negative momentum, taker sells) offset by clear mean-reversion signals (RSI 22.5, Extreme Fear). F&G at 9 is treated as conflict rather than pure contrarian because derivatives (negative funding, OI drop, taker sell bias) show ongoing downside pressure, preventing any bullish override.

ETH.reasoning: Setup flat regge per conflitto interno: trend e relative weakness spingono ribasso ma RSI 23.7 e F&G=9 suggeriscono rimbalzo contrarian. Derivati mostrano long ancora affollati (LS 2.28) con funding lieve negativo e taker sellish, impedendo lettura univoca momentum o contrarian. Nessuna contraddizione tale da veto.

BTW.reasoning: Setup fragile: +630% 7d rally + RSI 97.1 creates major reversal risk that overrides Extreme Fear contrarian signal. Derivatives show mild bullish flow but long/short ratio favors shorts. Conflict between momentum and mean-reversion dominates; Fear & Greed cannot justify long here.

BEAT.reasoning: Setup fragile: long su momentum estremo ma RSI 91.9 e +328% in 7d segnalano rischio mean-reversion forte. Fear&Greed a 9 pesato come conflict (non puro contrarian) perché taker buy sale ma OI crolla e long/short crolla; momentum prevale sui derivati ma incoerenza alta con overbought.

VELVET.reasoning: Setup fragile: RSI 92.4 e +291% in 7d segnalano ipercomprato estremo, in netto contrasto con l'uso di Extreme Fear come segnale contrarian. Fear & Greed pesa negativamente perché l'estremo non coincide con minimi ma con parabolic move; derivati non ribaltano il quadro. Abbasso conviction di 2.

ALLO.reasoning: Setup coerente: forte estensione + inversione 24h con RSI 72 e taker sell-side supportano mean-reversion short. Extreme Fear (F&G=9) genera conflict perché tipicamente contrarian long, ma qui prevale il momentum locale di reversal; funding neutro e OI in calo non contraddicono.

WLD.reasoning: Extreme Fear (F&G=9) is weighed as contrarian but undermined by persistent taker selling (ratio 0.93) and falling OI (-23%), creating conflict with the long bias. Crowded longs (1.68) add fragility despite neutral RSI. Setup holds directionally but conviction lowered.
